description: A water meter has reached the end of its service life and needs to be replaced.

nodes.task_description: The asset management system flags a meter that is due for replacement.

expected_outcome.value: System automatically generates a replacement work order.

nodes.task_description: Notify the customer of the upcoming required meter change and provide a scheduling link.

expected_outcome.value: System sends a notification to the customer.

nodes.task_description: Once scheduled, assign the work order to a field technician.

expected_outcome.value: System dispatches the work order for the scheduled date.
